title: Republicans call off vote on Iran war resolution — postponed to June 2 after Memorial Day recess; Jared Golden (D-ME) planning to flip to yes
snippet: House Republicans called off the vote on the Iran war powers resolution, postponing it to June 2 when the chamber returns from Memorial Day recess. The legislative clock forces a vote by that date. Rep. Jared Golden (D-ME) is reportedly planning to flip his vote to yes, which would add to the 4 Republicans who previously voted in favor. The postponement underscores growing bipartisan pressure to invoke the War Powers Resolution.
tag_reason: New details emerge: June 2 hard deadline due to legislative clock, and Jared Golden's planned flip to yes. Previous coverage (src-1261) reported the cancellation but not the June 2 date or Golden's flip.
